item.title: Climate Change Chart / Cherry Blossom Festivals
item.description: They are blossoming right now! But the winds were incredibly strong last night, so they might have all blown down. I'll have a look after the rain and wind have died down. Edit; I went on a bicycle ride and saw that the cherry blossoms are still up, and then came home to see that this made this Front Page! Happy Spring, y'all. Fuck Trump.
item.dc:creator: slimvictor

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @anastasiatrusova did this painting. I love the colors! Check out more of their work in their other posts and leave some love.
27 Man Tax: Adrian Grenier
“If we judge by wealth and power, our times are the best of times; if the times have made us willing to judge by wealth and power, they are the worst of times.” - Randall Jarrell So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

item.title: Makeup I did to cope with how aggressively unwell and depressed I am…. (TW)
item.description:
Hello Imgur. (trigger warning- I talk about mental health, self harm, suicide, pet loss in this post. If that is too heavy for you please don’t continue.) I know selfies are frowned upon but I wanted to do something artistic, and my face ended up being the canvas… idk I really like how it turned out, and it helped me get out of a place where I actually was wanting to harm myself. My last episode of self harm was in October- so I’m going pretty strong That said- I am really, REALLY struggling, and it’s so hard to live every day man. I haven’t done pen to paper art in so long- i was starting to feel worried that I lost my capabilities! So when this makeup idea hit me, and I was able to execute it, I don’t know… it felt like a glimmer of good in the midst of all the suffering and struggling. My health is abysmal, both bodily and mentally. I lost two of my pet rats, Peter Paul and Deeble (I’ve posted them a lot on here. They had a lot of internet friends ☹️?)- they were literally my besties. I have a serious chronic illness (EGPA- a type of vasculitis) and I spend a lot of time in bed sick. The rats were with me constantly. They got me through a lot. They took care of me just as much, if not more, than I took care of them. I’m not exaggerating when I say that I would not be here without those boys. I know times suck for everyone. The world is on fire. I know everyone is struggling. I need help- and this community has shown up for me before. I don’t deserve it… but unfortunately, to keep on existing, I humbly ask for some help from the beautiful strangers of the internet. Losing the boys, not only destroyed me- but it destroyed my finances. I’m desolate. Deeble fought two massive abscesses on his chin/neck for almost three months. There were a lot of vet visits. A lot of meds. At the end, lots of tears… because the abscesses kept returning and I had to end that suffering for my baby. I cry as I type this, remembering him… I held his sweet little ratty hand up until the very last moment of his life as he was humanely euthanized. I also am having a lot of coverage issues with my insurance and it’s extremely frustrating because I genuinely do not have a source of income at the moment. I have been two sick to work conventional jobs for like two years. I used to sell art and prints very regularly for money, but that has slowed due to a stupid neck injury I have as well. Yay nerve damage! Anyways this has gotten really long. I’m going to share my ko fi page link if anyone feels inclined to help a sick and very sad girl. Also my art is on there. Here’s the link: https://ko-fi.com/darkratlord/goal?g=23 Also here is my direct PyaPal link: @sillygooseinc Thank you so much to anyone who read all of this. Thank you to everyone who has ever liked my ratty or art posts… I’ve gotten comments and messages on here that I re visit often, just because the resonate with me and help me feel like I should keep going. Thank you. Thanks for reading, viewing, up or down voting. All of it- thank you! Have an amazing day or night wherever you are- and if you have pets, please give them an extra kiss for me.
Black and white version
My Deeble ☹️?
Rescue and foster ratties! Mikazuki is the grey and white one, and Choso is the black and white one.
Deeb?
It was so hard watching him lose a lot of weight towards the end…
Another random makeup look I thought I’d throw in
He loved shoulder rides!
Here is Deeble and Peter Paul cuddled up together- this is how I imagine them, on the rainbow bridge
Artz
My mood
Here are some pics of my disturbing swelling I get bc of my disease lol. My joints also get really warm to the touch and painful when they swell like this.
Haha…. Ha. Ha.
OWWIE :-)
Pain and agony
item.dc:creator: DarkRatLord3000

item.title: Orwell may turn out to be the most prescient writer of all time.
item.description: Political language is designed to make lies sound truthful and murder respectable, and to give an appearance of solidity to pure wind.” – 1984
item.dc:creator: ChromePlatedEquator

item.title: Every one of Trump's Minions believe they the safe and chosen ones, right up until Trump is throwing them under the bus.
item.description: Hahahahahahahaha, fuck you, you lying nazi pedophile protecting bitch. How's that orange dick after taste now that he's took it away from you? I hope she asks for immunity and tells the truth about trump raping children.

item.title: Return of the meme: 1660 (funny crabs)
item.description:
Let's get that bread
Me, constantly.
Hell yeah
I usually reference this quote once a day.
Who wants to join my left wing rebel group?
Hell yeah.
Basically the Wallace line is the boundary between two whole ecozones. Few creatures ever crossed it.
I know this is probably AI, but goddamn this made me laugh hard. It's the sort of capitalist bullshit I'd expect someone to make if this actually happened.
WHELP
Seriously, watch the Dinosauria series by Dead Sound.
I know i posted this yesterday but again, it's one of those memes I found so hilarious and so niche that I can't resist
Aaaaaaaaaaa
Hell yeah
This is my exact philosophy
Meanings of the names of provinces of Yemen.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "beep" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Unverified rumor.
item.description: Speculation that Donald Trump is at Walter Reed Medical. The roads around the hospital are reportedly closed off. The White House has called a “lid” meaning that Donald Trump will not be seen in public today.
item.dc:creator: sleeperkid
